# apple-music-cleaner

> Bulk-remove Apple Music favorites or wipe your library using web-player session tokens. No paid Apple Developer account. CLI + local web UI.

## Docs

- [README](https://github.com/mpellouin/apple-music-cleaner/blob/main/README.md): Installation, tokens, full CLI reference, FAQ
- [AGENTS.md](https://github.com/mpellouin/apple-music-cleaner/blob/main/AGENTS.md): Coding agent guide
- [Site](https://mpellouin.github.io/apple-music-cleaner/): GitHub Pages landing
- [Mac library DB](https://github.com/mpellouin/apple-music-cleaner/blob/main/docs/mac-library-db.md): Play counts via Music.app
- [Recommendations reset](https://github.com/mpellouin/apple-music-cleaner/blob/main/docs/recommendations-reset.md): After wipe

## Install

```sh
npm install -g apple-music-cleaner
npx apple-music-cleaner presets
```

## Use cases

- Remove all or selective favorites (presets, filters, dry-run preview with reasons)
- Remove dislikes, empty playlists, duplicate favorites, orphan album tracks
- Wipe library (full or by category), exclude purchased items
- Snapshot inventory before/after, resume failed deletions
- Web UI with selective cleanup wizard

## Commands

- `apple-music-cleaner --preset stale-favorites`
- `apple-music-cleaner --added-before 365 --execute`
- `apple-music-cleaner empty-playlists --execute`
- `apple-music-cleaner snapshot save before.json`
- `apple-music-cleaner resume failures.json`
- `npm run web` — local UI on port 3000

## Limitations

- Private web-player API (same as music.apple.com)
- Recent-played feed is bounded (not full play log)
- Cannot reset recommendations via API

## Optional

- [LICENSE](https://github.com/mpellouin/apple-music-cleaner/blob/main/LICENSE): MIT
